imageGeneration.promptTemplate: A realistic [animal] standing in a natural jungle environment, full body visible including head, legs and tail, centered in frame, animal filling most of the frame but no body parts cut off. Camera slightly low angle and close so the animal fills the portrait frame naturally. Lush tropical green foliage, jungle plants and trees surrounding the animal, natural daylight filtering through leaves. Ultra-detailed skin/fur texture, realistic anatomy, cinematic wildlife photography style, shallow depth of field, soft background bokeh, National Geographic style, highly detailed, photorealistic, natural colors, sharp focus on the animal. Portrait composition, 1024x1536, professional wildlife photo, no text, no watermark. 85mm lens, f/2.8, wildlife photography, cinematic lighting

videoGeneration.notes: Different prompt was used for each animal. Fill videoPrompt per item.
